settings.heading: Start with the room. Finish with the right detail.
settings.copy: Shop Seendoor through the same choices a home project follows: room, lighting type, style, availability, and the finishing pieces around it.

settings.title: Menu-first
settings.copy: Lighting, Best Sellers, New Arrivals, Homeware, and Quick Ship stay visible.

settings.title: Quick Ship
settings.copy: A required fast-delivery route is built into the home page.

settings.title: Summer codes
settings.copy: SD10, SD13, and SD15 remain the only campaign codes.

settings.label: Main menu
settings.title: Lighting
settings.caption: Browse by room, fixture type, or design style.

settings.heading: Choose the space first, then narrow the edit.
settings.copy: This mirrors how customers shop: project first, product category second. The side menu keeps the full Lighting navigation visible.

settings.heading: The shortlist customers return to.
settings.copy: A focused product carousel creates confidence before the page opens into deeper browsing.

settings.heading: Let the object set the rhythm.
settings.copy: Pendant, ceiling, wall, table, and floor lighting stay in one balanced row on desktop.

settings.copy: Handles, pulls, ornaments, and candle holders extend the same edit into the details shoppers touch every day.

settings.heading: Build the room, then apply the right code.
settings.copy: Click a code to copy it. Use SD10, SD13, or SD15 at checkout depending on project size.
